title: 有馬記念の後に・チケゾーコール

text_block_list.name: BNW
text_block_list.text: YEAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, three fine racers ran with all their might
amid roars from the stands. Each held the same
goal in her heart—to achieve nothing less than
first place.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I won't lose! I won't lose! I WON'T lose!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ticket's boundless determination to seize victory
stirred the hearts of all who witnessed it...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'M GONNA WIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...and inspired each and every one of them to
dream.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket claims first! First place goes to
Winning Ticket!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: YESSSSS!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm first! I got first place!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I hate to admit it, but I lost. You ran great.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But next time, I'll be the one to win!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm defeated—well done. The next time we race,
though, I won't be letting you have the victory. I
promise you that.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Next time, I'll be the winner.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I hear you, loud and clear!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You know, whenever we all race, it really lights a
fire in my soul!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I have a lot of respect for you two. You're my
special super rivals.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So what I mean is, let's keep racing together!
Next time, and the time after too! I won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hmph... I'll accept your challenge any time.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Sniff... Tickezo won... I'm so happy...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Tickezo! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: TIC-KE-ZO! TIC-KE-ZO!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Uwaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the celebration increases, cheers for Tickezo
resound through the whole track.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
(It's like everyone's eyes are shining with
excitement!)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: (They're all so happy for me!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket stands tall, looks up toward the
audience, and cries out...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: THANK YOOOOUUU!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her smile is as bright and warm as the sun.
